column4: The language your dreams have been speaking all along
column5: Your subconscious communicates in symbols. Are you listening?
column6: Night 3: entering the hypnagogic state consciously. Dream symbolism: water (emotion), doors (transitions), flying (freedom), animals (instinct/guidance). Traditions of dream interpretation: Sufi, Jungian, shamanic. Encourage journaling. The act of paying attention changes the dreams themselves.
column7: Tonight: practice the observer technique. Watch hypnagogia without following.
column8: P.S. Many practitioners find that their dreams become more vivid and meaningful simply from paying attention. Notice if this happens for you.
